name: Fangyikang Wang
subtitle: M.Eng. Student in Computer Science, Zhejiang University
summary:
Hi there 👋. I am currently a research scientist at [Minimax](https://www.minimax.io/). My research interests include visual generation and the theoretical understanding of generative models. I am active in top international AI conferences such as NeurIPS, ICML, and ICLR.

I received both my bachelor’s and master’s degrees from the Department of Computer Science and Technology, Zhejiang University (浙江大学计算机科学与技术学院), under the supervision of [Prof. Hui Qian](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=n4csXw0AAAAJ&hl=en) and [Prof. Chao Zhang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Clhvcw8AAAAJ&hl=en). I also collaborate closely with [Hubery Yin](https://openreview.net/profile?id=~Hubery_Yin1) (WeChat Vision), [Dr. Li Chen](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WDJL3gYAAAAJ&hl=en) (WeChat Vision), [Dr. Zebang Shen](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=klqzFvgAAAAJ&hl=en) (ETH Zürich), and [Prof. Mingming Gong](https://mingming-gong.github.io/) (MBZUAI & UniMelb).
